title: asplenium hollandii
intro: Asplenium hollandii is a species of fern, commonly known as the Dutch oak fern or New Zealand oak fern, that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. Asplenium hollandii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Asplenium hollandii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
